title: Crispy Roast Australian White Masarepa Pilaf
description: A fresh and crispy kid-friendly dish featuring white masarepa that is both low-sodium and perfect for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: Pepper Flakes (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added flavor, optional to taste

instructions: In a bowl, mix white masarepa with Rice Oil. If desired, add pepper flakes for extra flavor.
Heat the mixture in a pan until it forms a thick paste, stirring continuously to prevent sticking.
Chop the garlic and finely chop the onion. Mix them into the pasted masarepa mixture.
Add cumin seeds to the mix and saffron threads if using. Stir well to distribute evenly.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Spread it out in an even layer for better crispiness.
Bake in preheated oven for 25 minutes or until golden brown on top, stirring occasionally to ensure even cooking.
Once done, remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
